articles.author: Amanda Silberling
articles.title: Light made a flip phone — it’s colorful and it’s cheap - TechCrunch
articles.description: Light co-founder Kaiwei Tang helped create the Motorola Razr, and he's as surprised as anyone that over 20 years later, the flip phone is relevant again.
articles.content: Kaiwei Tang helped create the iconic Motorola Razr over 20 years ago. Now, 10 years into building Light, the startup behind the minimalist smartphone alternative Light Phone, he’s as surprised as any… [+4372 chars]

articles.title: China AI Sensation Moonshot’s Gamble on Big Models Pays Off - Bloomberg.com
articles.description: Crowds rushed to an obscure corner of China’s premier tech summit, moving past monumental booths from Alibaba Group Holding Ltd. and Tencent Holdings Ltd. to catch a glimpse of the hottest name in domestic AI.
